summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Learning Assistant MVP completed. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working excellently with minor document upload integration issue.

integration_issues.issue: File upload via UI not triggering backend API call properly

passed_tests: Progress stats API with all required fields
Weekly activity API returning 7 days data
AI chat message sending and receiving
Flashcard study interface with flip animations
Dashboard page loading with stats cards
AI Chat UI with session management
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix document upload frontend integration - file input change event not properly triggering API call to backend

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all features working except document upload integration)
